THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, XIAOFEI BAI, JUNHAI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EAST STAR BUILDING SUPPLY CO., INC NOTHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
